title: Li Auto Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights
text: Li Auto delivered record Q3 results with total revenues reaching RMB 42.9 billion, representing 23.6% year-over-year growth. The company achieved gross margin expansion to 21.5% and non-GAAP operating income of RMB 4.4 billion—an all-time high. Vehicle deliveries exceeded 152,000 units in Q3, up 45.4% year over year. NEV penetration has reached 50.3% in the Chinese market. Li Auto solidified its leadership in the RMB 200,000+ segment, capturing 17.3% market share in Q3. The company surpassed multiple European premium brands in this category for the first time. The L6 model emerged as a standout performer, achieving over 139,000 cumulative deliveries in just six months since launch, making it the best-selling model among new vehicles released this year. The company deployed end-to-end vision-language autonomous driving technology across 320,000 vehicles. Average mileage per intervention increased nearly 2.5 times in just three months through rapid iteration cycles. For Q4 2024, management expects deliveries between 160,000-170,000 units, with full-year guidance of 502,000-512,000 vehicles. The company targets launching multiple pure electric SUV models and expanding its charging network to over 2,000 stations before BEV market entry.
